Description: Sellers register and create storefronts with product listings
Search by category, price range, material, artisan location
Stripe Connect for split payments to sellers, support for USD/EUR/GBP
Sales reports, traffic analytics, conversion rates per product

Dynamic meta tags, sitemap, structured data for Google Shopping
